name: Project Zomboid
author: DannyDeeps <dannyhuggins@proton.me>
description: Custom-maintained Project Zomboid dedicated server. Supports Steam Workshop mods, multi-player configuration, and auto-updates. Build 41+ compatible.

variables.name: Server Name
variables.description: The name of your Project Zomboid server

variables.name: Admin Password
variables.description: Password for the admin account. Leave empty to use the preset admin username.

variables.name: Server Port
variables.description: UDP port the server will listen on

variables.name: Max Players
variables.description: Maximum number of players allowed on the server

variables.name: Public Server
variables.description: Whether the server is publicly listed on the server browser

variables.name: Pause When Empty
variables.description: Pause the game world when no players are online

variables.name: Steam Branch
variables.description: Steam branch to use (public, unstable, or a beta branch name)

variables.name: Mod IDs
variables.description: Semicolon-separated list of mod IDs to enable (e.g. ModID1;ModID2)

variables.name: Workshop Item IDs
variables.description: Comma-separated list of Steam Workshop item IDs (e.g. 123456789,987654321)

variables.name: Preset Admin Username
variables.description: Username for the admin player on this server

variables.name: Server Password
variables.description: Password required for players to join. Leave empty for no password.

variables.name: JVM Arguments
variables.description: Java Virtual Machine arguments (heap size, garbage collector, etc.)

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Automatically update the server on restart via SteamCMD
